chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1200 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag „A‟ 2. For hearing of CMA No.4787/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 12.08.2025 Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Shaikh, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant Advocate General Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State SIP Dhani Bux Bhutto on behalf of SSP, Sukkur SIP Ghulam Nabi Shaikh, Investigating Officer Crime No.164 of 2025 of PS „C‟ Section, Sukkur >>>>>..<<<<< Pursuant to directions SIP Ghulam Nabi Shaikh of Police Station „C‟ Section, Sukkur, Investigating Officer of Crime No.164 of 2025 Police Station “C” Section Sukkur is present and submits that as per directions of this Court today he has recorded statement of petitioner No.1, namely Mst. Tayyaba Noor and placed copy of the same on record. Per her statement, petitioner No.1 Mst. Tayyaba Noor has categorically denied the allegations contained in the impugned FIR as same are nothing but bundle of lies and she is passing happily marital life with petitioner No.2 and submits that respondent No.5/her father Nazir Hussain has lodged a false FIR just to disturb her peaceful married life. She has further stated that she being adult and sui juris has entered into nikkah with petitioner No.2, namely Muhammad Salman according to her own free will and in consonance of injunctions of Islam. She, therefore, submits that she would prefer to go with her husband. In view of statement of petitioner No.1 Mst.Tayyaba Noor, it appears that purpose of instant petition has been served.

She, therefore, submits that she would prefer to go with her husband. In view of statement of petitioner No.1 Mst.Tayyaba Noor, it appears that purpose of instant petition has been served. Learned counsel for petitioners seeks disposal of instant petition. Order accordingly. Investigating Officer SIP Ghulam Nabi Shaikh of Police Station „C‟ Section, Sukkur is directed to submit report under section 173 Cr.P.C before the Court having jurisdiction in the light of statement of petitioner Mst. Tayyaba Noor within ten days. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
